scenarios.name: Artifact schema validation
scenarios.description: Validated the April 15 artifact directory with the repository schema validator.
scenarios.details: `node schemas/validate.js content/days/2026-04-15` passed decision.json, feedback-digest.json, test-results.json, spec.md, build-summary.md, and review.md.

scenarios.name: Scenario difficulty validation
scenarios.description: Ran the deterministic April 15 scenario difficulty validator.
scenarios.details: `npm run validate:scenario-difficulty -- --date 2026-04-15` found a canonical win but failed the roster-expansion gate because the April 14 two-plant roster can still clear the April 15 board. Sunroot Bloom is available but not required yet.

scenarios.name: Sunroot targeted Playwright coverage
scenarios.description: Ran the Sunroot, roster asset, and April 14 alias test subset in routed local-file mode.
scenarios.details: `PLAYWRIGHT_DISABLE_WEBSERVER=1 npm run test:uiux -- tests/uiux/game-sunroot-bloom.spec.js tests/uiux/game-roster-assets.spec.js tests/uiux/game-board-scout-2026-04-14-validation.spec.js` passed 9 tests.

scenarios.name: Default full Playwright suite
scenarios.description: Attempted the requested default full UI/UX command.
scenarios.details: `npm run test:uiux` could not start the configured Playwright web server in the sandbox: `listen EPERM: operation not permitted 127.0.0.1:3000`.

scenarios.name: Full Playwright suite in routed mode
scenarios.description: Ran the full suite without a web server to gather a regression signal.
scenarios.details: `PLAYWRIGHT_DISABLE_WEBSERVER=1 npm run test:uiux` reported 284 passed and 61 failed after syncing older content artifacts. The failures are dominated by older tests that call bare `page.goto("/")` or `request.get("/...")`, which require the configured web server/baseURL and are incompatible with routed local-file mode.
